title: Italian Casserole
description: A hearty Italian-inspired casserole made with tender vegetables and flavorful seasonings.

ingredients.name: Peppery vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as bell peppers and zucchini

instructions: Cook the American casserole according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, sauté the peppery vegetables in a little bit of oil until tender.
Add the Italian seasoning, garlic powder, and salt to the skillet and stir to combine.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked casserole, sautéed vegetables, and marinara sauce. Mix well to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with shredded mozzarella cheese.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
